results.title: From Japan to Venezuela: How & Why Earthquakes Occur, Know the Science Behind Recent Global Tremors
results.description: According to experts, large earthquakes frequently occur around the world each year because multiple tectonic plate boundaries are continuously accumulating and releasing stress independently.

results.title: Worried about Statin side effects? New Oxford Research has some reassuring answers
results.description: A major Oxford study involving more than 150,000 participants has found that most commonly reported statin side effects are not actually caused by the cholesterol-lowering drugs. Here’s what the latest research reveals about statin safety, muscle pain and heart health.
